common.supportMessage: If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team.

auth.welcomeMessage1: Thanks for signing up. Please verify your email to get started.
auth.welcomeMessage2: Tap the button below to verify your email address.
auth.welcomeSubject: Welcome to Nasta — verify your email
auth.verifyEmailMessage: Please confirm your email address to activate your account.
auth.alternativeLink: If the button doesn't work, open this link:
auth.alternativeCode: Or enter this code in the app:
auth.ignoreEmail: If you didn’t request this, you can ignore this email.
auth.nextStep3: Chat and coordinate directly in the app
auth.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been verified successfully. Your account is now active.
auth.emailVerifiedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your email has been verified successfully. Your account is now active.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
auth.emailVerifiedBody: Your email is verified. Your account is active.
auth.passwordResetText:
Use this token to reset your password: {{token}}

If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
auth.temporaryPasswordText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Here is your temporary password: {{tempPassword}}

Please sign in and change it as soon as possible.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
auth.emailChangeText:
Use this token to confirm your email change: {{token}}

If you didn't request this, ignore this email.

support.ticketCreatedMessage: Thanks for contacting Nasta support. We’ve created a ticket and will get back to you as soon as possible.
support.subject: Subject
support.reviewMessage: Our team will review your request and reply as soon as possible.
support.thankYouMessage: Thank you for helping us improve Nasta.
support.abuseReportThankYou: Thank you for reporting this. Your report helps keep our community safe.
support.abuseReportInvestigation: Our safety team will investigate and take appropriate action if needed.
support.abuseReportReview: We may follow up if we need more information.
support.emergencyContact: If you or someone else is in immediate danger, contact local emergency services.
support.abuseReportThankYouCommunity: Thank you for helping keep the Nasta community safe.
support.securityReportThankYou: Thank you for reporting a security concern. We take security seriously.
support.securityReportInvestigation: Our security team will investigate and may contact you for more details.
support.securityReportThoroughInvestigation: We’ll do a thorough review and take appropriate action.
support.securityRecommendation1: Change your password if you suspect account compromise
support.securityRecommendation2: Enable device security (PIN/Face ID) and keep your OS updated
support.securityRecommendation3: Be cautious of suspicious links or messages
support.surveyThankYouText:
Hi {{userName}},

Thank you for completing the {{roleName}} survey. Your feedback has been received.

Reference: {{ticketNumber}}

Warm regards,
Nasta Team
support.surveyThankYouMessage: Thank you for completing the {{roleName}} survey. Your feedback helps us improve.
support.surveyAppreciation: Here’s how we use your feedback:
support.surveyVoiceMatters: Your voice matters, and we read every submission.
support.surveyAdditionalThoughts: If you have additional thoughts, feel free to contact support.
support.surveyThankYouCommunity: Thank you for being part of Nasta.
support.responseText:
Hi {{userName}},

We’ve replied to your support ticket {{ticketNumber}}.

Response:
{{response}}

Best regards,
{{adminName}}
Nasta Support Team
support.responseThankYou: Thanks for reaching out. Here is our response:
support.responseFurtherQuestions: If you have more questions, reply to this email and mention ticket {{ticketNumber}}.

deletion.requestCreatedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

We have received your account deletion request.

Reference: {{ticketNumber}}
Reason: {{reason}}

Our team will review your request. You will be notified once a decision is made. If you did not request this, please contact support immediately.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
deletion.htmlMessage: We're sorry to see you go. We have received your request to delete your account and all associated data.
deletion.htmlNextSteps: Our team will carefully review your request. You will receive a notification once a decision has been made. This process typically takes 1–3 business days.
deletion.htmlChangeMindMessage: If you did not request this, or if you would like to cancel this request, please contact our support team immediately at {{supportEmail}} or cancel the request from within the app.
deletion.requestApprovedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your account deletion request ({{ticketNumber}}) has been approved. Your account and data will be permanently removed.

If you have questions, contact support.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
deletion.requestDeniedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your account deletion request ({{ticketNumber}}) has been reviewed and denied.

Notes: {{adminNotes}}

Your account remains active. You can log in as usual.

Best regards,
Nasta Team

legal.restrictMessage: Your account has been restricted. Please review the details above and contact support if you have questions.
legal.actionTakenMessage: An action has been taken on your account. Please review the details above and contact support if you have questions.
legal.actionFooter: If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.
legal.actionNotificationBody: Your account has been subject to a legal action: {{actionType}}. Reason: {{reason}}
legal.warningText:
Dear {{firstName}} {{lastName}},

You have received a {{warningType}} warning on your account.

{{warningSeverity}}

Warning Message:
{{message}}

Please review our platform rules and ensure compliance. Continued violations may result in account suspension or termination.

If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.

Best regards,
Nasta Support Team
legal.warningReceived: You have received a {{warningType}} warning on your account.
legal.warningComplianceMessage: Please review our platform rules and ensure compliance. Continued violations may result in account suspension or termination.
legal.warningContactMessage: If you have any questions or believe this is an error, please contact our support team immediately.
legal.finalWarningSeverity: FINAL WARNING - This is your last warning before account suspension
legal.majorWarningSeverity: MAJOR VIOLATION - Serious action may be taken if behavior continues
legal.minorWarningSeverity: Minor Violation - Please review and correct your behavior
legal.actionRevokedText:
Dear {{firstName}},

The following action has been revoked:

{{subject}}

If you have any questions, please contact our support team.
legal.actionRevokedMessage: The following action has been revoked:

actionForm.subject: 📋 Action Form: {{actionType}} - {{firstName}} {{lastName}}
actionForm.text:
Dear {{firstName}} {{lastName}},

An action form has been submitted regarding your account.

Action Type: {{actionType}}

Details:
{{details}}

Please review the information above and take any necessary action. If you have any questions or need clarification, please contact our support team.

Best regards,
Nasta Support Team
actionForm.title: 📋 Action Form Notice
actionForm.submittedMessage: An action form has been submitted regarding your account.
actionForm.reviewMessage: Please review the information above and take any necessary action. If you have any questions or need clarification, please contact our support team.
actionForm.notificationBody: An action form has been submitted regarding your account. Action Type: {{actionType}}

kyc.documentApprovedMessage: Great news! Your {{documentName}} has been approved by our verification team.
kyc.verificationProgressing: Your KYC verification is progressing. We'll notify you once all documents are reviewed.
kyc.documentRejectedMessage: We've reviewed your {{documentName}}, but unfortunately it has been rejected.
kyc.uploadNewDocument: Please log in to your account and upload a new document. If you have questions, contact our support team.
kyc.documentApprovedText: {{documentName}} has been approved. Your verification is progressing.
kyc.documentRejectedText: {{documentName}} has been rejected. Please upload a new document.
kyc.documentRequiredText: {{documentName}} Required. Reason: {{reason}}. Please log in to upload.
kyc.documentRequiredMessage: To complete your verification, we need the following document:
kyc.instruction1: Open the Nasta app and go to Verification.
kyc.instruction2: Upload a clear photo or scan of the requested document.
kyc.instruction3: Make sure all details are visible and readable.
kyc.instruction4: Submit and we’ll review it as soon as possible.

payments.jobCompletedSuccessfullyMessage: The job "{{jobTitle}}" has been completed successfully.
payments.rateYourExperienceMessage: Help us improve by rating your experience with this job.

receipts.payoutMessage: Your payment of {{amount}} has been transferred to your account. Transfer ID: {{transferId}}
receipts.payoutTimeline: Funds typically arrive in your bank account within 2-5 business days.
receipts.footerNote: This receipt serves as your official record of payment. Please keep it for your records.

jobs.jobReferralSubject: {{employerName}} referred you to a job opportunity on Nasta
jobs.jobReferralMessage: {{employerName}} ({{employerEmail}}) has referred you to a job opportunity on Nasta that might be a great fit for your skills!
jobs.jobReferralFooter: This referral was sent by {{employerName}}. If you didn't expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
jobs.applicationSubmittedMessage: Great news! Your application has been submitted successfully.
jobs.applicationSubmittedText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been submitted successfully.

Location: {{jobLocation}}

We'll notify you once the employer reviews your application.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.applicationStatusMessage: The employer will review your application and get back to you soon. We'll notify you when there's an update.
jobs.nextStep1: Wait for the employer to review your application
jobs.nextStep4: Keep your profile updated to increase your chances
jobs.applicationUnderReviewEmailSubject: Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" is being reviewed
jobs.applicationUnderReviewMessage: Good news! The employer has started reviewing your application for "{{jobTitle}}". You will be notified once a decision is made.
jobs.applicationUnderReviewText:
Hi {{firstName}},

Good news! The employer has started reviewing your application for "{{jobTitle}}". You will be notified once a decision is made.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.serviceStartedProviderMessage: You have successfully verified the code and started the service for "{{jobTitle}}". The employer has been notified.
jobs.serviceStartedProviderText:
Hi {{firstName}},

You have successfully verified the code and started the service for "{{jobTitle}}". The employer has been notified.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.applicationAcceptedMessage: We're thrilled to inform you that your application for "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}} has been accepted!
jobs.applicationAcceptedEmailSubject: Congratulations! Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been accepted
jobs.acceptedNextStep1: The employer will contact you shortly with next steps
jobs.acceptedNextStep2: Check your notifications for any updates
jobs.acceptedNextStep3: You can also chat with the employer directly through Nasta
jobs.applicationRejectedMessage: Thank you for your interest in the position "{{jobTitle}}" with {{employerName}}. After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates at this time.
jobs.keepGoingMessage: Don't be discouraged. This is just one opportunity, and there are many more waiting for you on Nasta.
jobs.rejectedNextStep2: Keep your profile updated and complete
jobs.rejectedNextStep3: Apply to positions that match your skills
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneMessage: The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneText:
Hello {{employerName}},

The service provider ({{applicantName}}) has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done.

Please review and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneReviewMessage: The service provider has completed their work and is ready for your review. Please verify the completion and mark the job as complete to finalize the payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneNextSteps: Review the completed work and mark the job as complete in your dashboard to proceed with payment.
jobs.jobMarkedAsDoneFooter: Once you mark the job as complete, the payment process will be finalized according to your payment terms.
jobs.newJobMatchText:
A new job "{{jobTitle}}" matches your skills and is near you in {{city}}.
Address: {{location}}
jobs.newJobMatchNotificationBody: A new job "{{jobTitle}}" matches your skills and is near you in {{city}}. Address: {{location}}
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableMessage: We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableText:
Hello {{applicantName}},

We wanted to inform you that the job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer available.

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableBrowse: You can still browse other jobs from different employers or explore different opportunities on our platform.
jobs.jobNoLongerAvailableAppreciate: We appreciate your interest and encourage you to continue applying to other positions.
jobs.applicationWithdrawnMessage: {{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".
jobs.applicationWithdrawnText:
Hello {{employerName}},

{{applicantName}} has withdrawn their application for the job "{{jobTitle}}".

Reason: {{reason}}

You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.

Best regards,
Nasta Team
jobs.applicationWithdrawnBrowse: You can still browse other applications for this job or post new jobs.

referral.invitationMessage2: Create your free account to discover opportunities, connect with trusted people, and manage work with ease.
referral.benefit1: Discover local opportunities that match your skills
referral.benefit2: Chat and coordinate directly in the app
referral.benefit3: Secure flows for bookings and payments
referral.benefit4: Build trust with profiles, reviews, and verification
referral.invitationFooter: This invitation was sent by {{referrerName}}. If you weren't expecting it, you can safely ignore this email.
referral.invitationText:
Hi {{friendName}}!

{{referrerName}} ({{referrerEmail}}) invited you to join Nasta.

Create your free account here: {{signupLink}}

If you weren't expecting this email, you can ignore it.

instantJobRequest.newRequestIntro: Great news! An employer has requested your services for an instant job. Please review the details below and accept or decline the request in the app.
instantJobRequest.actionDescription: Open the Nasta app to review the full details and respond to this request. You can accept or decline with a reason.
instantJobRequest.noteText: If you accept this request, you'll be able to negotiate rates and availability with the employer before the job is confirmed.
instantJobRequest.footerText: This email was sent because an employer selected you for an instant job on Nasta.
instantJobRequest.acceptedIntro: {{providerName}} has accepted your instant job request. You can now proceed with negotiation and payment.
instantJobRequest.nextStep1: Review and negotiate rates with the service provider
instantJobRequest.nextStep2: Confirm payment to finalize the booking
instantJobRequest.nextStep3: Coordinate the job start date and details
instantJobRequest.rejectedIntro: Unfortunately, {{providerName}} has declined your instant job request.
instantJobRequest.whatNextText: You can browse other available service providers on Nasta and send a new request.

templates.applicationSubmittedBody: Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been submitted successfully
templates.newApplicationReceivedBody: Your job "{{jobTitle}}" has a new application
templates.newJobOpportunityBody: You have been invited to apply for "{{jobTitle}}"
templates.applicationAcceptedBody: Congratulations! Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been accepted!
templates.applicationAcceptedNegotiatedNoServicesB:
Congratulations! Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" has been accepted!

The employer has accepted your application based on the negotiated amount ({{currency}} {{amount}}) and did not select any of your original service offerings.
templates.applicationRejectedBody: Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" was not selected.
templates.applicationStatusBody: Your application status for "{{jobTitle}}" is now {{status}}
templates.applicationWithdrawnBody: {{applicantName}} can no longer make it to "{{jobTitle}}". Reason: {{reason}}
templates.applicationWithdrawnPushBody: {{applicantName}} can no longer make it to "{{jobTitle}}"
templates.additionalRatesRequestedBody: {{applicantName}} has requested additional rates for "{{jobTitle}}". Total: {{currency}} {{totalAmount}}
templates.additionalRatesApprovedBody: Your additional rates request for "{{jobTitle}}" has been approved.
templates.additionalRatesRejectedBody: Your additional rates request for "{{jobTitle}}" has been rejected.
templates.negotiationSuggestionBody: The employer has suggested a negotiation for "{{jobTitle}}". Please review and respond.
templates.negotiationRequestedBody: {{applicantName}} has requested a negotiation for "{{jobTitle}}". Please review and respond.
templates.negotiationEmployerSuggestionAcceptedBod: The service provider has accepted your negotiation suggestion for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.negotiationEmployerSuggestionRejectedBod: The service provider has rejected your negotiation suggestion for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.negotiationSeekerRequestAcceptedBody: The employer has accepted your negotiation request for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.negotiationSeekerRequestRejectedBody: The employer has rejected your negotiation request for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.counterOfferFromSeekerBody: The service provider has sent a counter offer for your negotiation suggestion on "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.counterOfferFromEmployerBody: The employer has sent a counter offer for your negotiation request on "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.applicationUnderReviewBody: Your application for "{{jobTitle}}" is now being reviewed by the employer.
templates.paymentReceivedBody: The employer has made a payment for "{{jobTitle}}". You are one step closer to getting started!
templates.serviceStartedBody: The service provider has verified the code and started the service for "{{jobTitle}}"
templates.serviceStartedProviderBody: You have successfully verified the code and started the service for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.additionalTimeRequestedBody: The employer has requested additional time for "{{jobTitle}}". Please review and respond.
templates.additionalTimeResponseReceivedBody: The service provider has responded to your additional time request for "{{jobTitle}}". They need {{days}}.
templates.additionalTimeRequestAcceptedBody: The employer has accepted your request for {{days}} for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.additionalTimeRequestRejectedBody: The employer has rejected your request for additional time for "{{jobTitle}}".
templates.jobMarkedAsDoneBody: The service provider has marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done. You can now mark it as complete.
templates.jobMarkedAsDoneProviderBody: You have marked the job "{{jobTitle}}" as done. The employer will review and confirm completion.
templates.jobCompletedBodyProvider: Your job "{{jobTitle}}" has been marked as complete. Payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} has been released.
templates.jobCompletedBodyEmployer: Your job "{{jobTitle}}" has been marked as complete.
templates.jobNoLongerAvailableBody: The job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer needed. Reason: {{reason}}. You can browse other jobs.
templates.jobNoLongerAvailablePushBody: The job "{{jobTitle}}" is no longer needed. Browse other jobs.
templates.bookingCancelledBody: The booking for "{{jobTitle}}" has been cancelled because the job was removed.
templates.bookingCancelledPushBody: The booking for "{{jobTitle}}" has been cancelled.
templates.trackingStartedTitle: Service Provider is on the way! 🚗
templates.trackingStartedBody: {{providerName}} has started tracking and is heading to "{{jobTitle}}"
templates.adminInfoRequestBody: An admin has requested information from you: {{request}}
templates.noShowWarningBody: You have been reported for not showing up to "{{jobTitle}}". This is a formal warning. Repeated no-shows will result in financial penalties and account restrictions.
templates.noShowPenaltyBody: You have been reported for not showing up to "{{jobTitle}}" (offense #{{offenseNumber}}). A penalty of {{formattedPenalty}} has been applied to your account. The amount will be deducted from your next job payout.
templates.jobCommitmentReminderBody: You have been accepted for "{{jobTitle}}". Please make sure to arrive on time ({{formattedDate}}). Failure to show up will result in warnings and financial penalties.
templates.accountDeletionRequestBody: Your deletion request {{ticketNumber}} has been received and is under review.
templates.accountDeletionApprovedBody: Your deletion request {{ticketNumber}} has been approved. Your account will be permanently removed.
templates.accountDeletionDeniedBody: Your deletion request {{ticketNumber}} has been denied. Your account remains active.
templates.employerAcceptanceThankYouBody: Thank you for accepting the application for "{{jobTitle}}". Once the service provider marks the job as done, please review and mark it as complete. If not completed manually, it will auto-complete 48 hours after the job start date ({{autoCompleteDate}}).
templates.employerAcceptanceThankYouPushBody: Thank you for accepting the application for "{{jobTitle}}". Remember to mark the job as complete after the service provider finishes.
templates.instantJobRequestAcceptedBody: {{providerName}} has accepted your instant job request for "{{jobTitle}}". You can now proceed with negotiations and payment.
templates.instantJobRequestRejectedBody: {{providerName}} has declined your instant job request for "{{jobTitle}}". Reason: {{reason}}
